# edgenext_ssl_certificates (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `page_number` (Number) Page number, must be greater than 0 if specified
- `page_size` (Number) Number of items per page, range 1-500 if specified

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `list` (List of Object) SSL certificate list (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--list))

<a id="nestedatt--list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `list`

Read-Only:

- `associated_domains` (List of String)
- `cert_expire_time` (String)
- `cert_id` (String)
- `cert_start_time` (String)
- `include_domains` (List of String)
- `name` (String)
